allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'devtools::load_all\(\); cat\("plot_moneca_ggraph signature:\\n"\); cat\("segments, level=1, layout=NULL, node_color=\\"segment\\", edge_width=\\"weight\\",\\n"\); cat\("node_size=\\"mobility\\", show_segments=TRUE, show_labels=TRUE, title=NULL,\\n"\); cat\("segment_naming=\\"auto\\", ...\\n\\n"\); cat\("plot_ego_ggraph signature:\\n"\); cat\("segments, mobility_matrix, ego_id, min_weight=0, layout=\\"stress\\",\\n"\); cat\("highlight_color=\\"#D55E00\\", flow_color=\\"viridis\\",\\n"\); cat\("node_size_range=c\(2,8\), edge_width_range=c\(0.2,3\), title=NULL,\\n"\); cat\("segment_naming=\\"auto\\", ...\\n\\n"\); cat\("plot_stair_ggraph signature:\\n"\); cat\("segments, levels=seq_along\(segments\\044segment.list\), layout=NULL, ncol=2,\\n"\); cat\("segment_naming=\\"auto\\", include_first_level=TRUE, ...\\n"\)')
